title: Sleepless Den
description: A curated magic and automation based pack. Unleash your inner wizardry with Ars Nouveau and automate with Create 6.0!
body:
Modpack Image by [Avogado6](https://www.avogado6.com/)  

# Sleepless Den has been updated to include Create 6.0 and recreated from the ground up!

***

# Server Admins please refer to the `Server Hosting` section below

***

## Welcome to the Sleepless Den.

This curated modpack focuses on [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [Ars Nouveau](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ars-nouveau). Gearing is primarily done with [Tinkers Construct](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct). This modpack will be balanced around **"Hard"** difficulty.

There is no easy teleportation via Waystones in this modpack in order to encourage everyone to play around Ars' Portals, and Create's Trains.

Also to encourage building, somewhat easy access to certain infinite resources can be had via [Create Mechanical Extruder](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-mechanical-extruder) and [Create Sifting](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-sifting).

Also to encourage a heavier production on the Create side, Ars Nouveaus resource generation has been tuned down to cost more for Drygmy production and Portal costs.

# Changes to Core Mechanics
These are some important but non exhaustive changes to core mechanics.

### Movement
- You can now parkour with [ParCool!](https://modrinth.com/mod/parcool)
### Combat
- Dual wield and combat changes with [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
- You can now parry to deflect blows and deal retaliatory damage with [Shield Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/shield-expansion)
### Death and Spawning
- You can set a temporary spawn with [Campfire Spawn and Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/campfire-spawn-and-tweaks)
- There's a whole death-centered expansion with [Corail Tombstone](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corail-tombstone)
  - Combine the grave key with an ender pearl and you can teleport to your grave, nice and easy.
- In multiplayer, your friends can revive you with [PlayerRevive](https://modrinth.com/mod/playerrevive)
### Food and Farming
- Blaze rods can be grown via [Blazing Bamboo](https://modrinth.com/mod/blazingbamboo)
- Ender pearls can be grown via [Ender Tendril](https://modrinth.com/mod/ender-tendril)
- **Valheim's food system replaces the vanilla food system with [Spice of Life: Valheim Edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/spice-of-life-valheim-edition)**

## Keybinds and Configs have been changed from their defaults
- Please explore the new [KeyBind Bundles](https://modrinth.com/mod/keybind-bundles) mod. It allows for a key to work for multiple binds. Here are some of the pre-configured bundles:
```
` - Opens up settings for several mods
. - Toggles Mute on Voicechat
LShift - Sprint (Changed for ease of use with Parcool)
LCtrl - Sneak (Changed for ease of use with Parcool)
Alt+B - Opens up Sophisticated Backpack binds
R - Quick Cast Spell 1
T - Toggle Spellbook
H - Ars Nouveau Key Bundle

While in a chest,
X - Extract all Items
Z - Insert all Items
LShift+X - Extract similar stacks you have
LShift+Z - Insert similar stacks in chest
```
- You can set a favourite by right-clicking a selection. Doing so will require you to press alt+key to access the key bundle again.
- Please feel free to change the bind and config settings to ones that suit you.

## [Full Modlist](https://github.com/Wistelle/SleeplessDen/wiki/Modlist)

## Server Hosting

To avoid first time crash for the server, you will need to do additional exclusions of `freecam` and `keymap`.

Otherwise, just relaunch the server and it will fix itself.
On a new world load I recommend to the following commands:
```
/gamerule playersSleepingPercentage 40
/chunky spawn
/chunky radius 2500
/chunky start
```
This sets the player sleeping percentage to 40, as well as pre-generates a radius of 2500 blocks around spawn.

You can read more about pre-generation from [Chunky docs](https://github.com/pop4959/Chunky/wiki/Pregeneration).

## Versioning
Versions follow the following general rules:  
Version: **A.B.C**  
A = Major Version; Requires Clients to use a new Instance. Major mod content introduction such as Create, Ars, Mekanism, Tinkers  
B = Minor Version; Requires Clients to use a new Instance. QoL mod content introduction such as Memory Leak Fix, Small Adventure mods  
C = Patch Version; Clients need not Update. Configuration Changes, keymap changes or balance changes
